content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed the branch diff against `origin/master` and read the changed implementation files end-to-end (`src/test_support/br.rs`, `src/test_support/bv.rs`, `src/test_support/e2e_fixtures.rs`, `src/test_support/fixtures.rs`, `src/test_support/mod.rs`). I did not find any actionable correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes.

## Amendments

None.
